title: D&D Origins
description: D&D Origins is a data pack that entirely replaces all of the default origins and classes with origins based on the races and classes from Dungeons & Dragons.
body:
# General Information
This is a data pack for the [Origins](https://modrinth.com/mod/origins) mod for fabric.  

This data pack replaces all of the default origins and classes with origins based on the races and classes from Dungeons & Dragons. 

## List of Races

- [Aarakocra](https://github.com/starlitWixen/dnd-origins/wiki/Aarakocra)
- [Aasimar](https://github.com/starlitWixen/dnd-origins/wiki/Aasimar)
- [Dragonborn](https://github.com/starlitWixen/dnd-origins/wiki/Dragonborn)
- [Dwarf](https://github.com/starlitWixen/dnd-origins/wiki/Dwarf)
- [Elf](https://github.com/starlitWixen/dnd-origins/wiki/Elf)
- [Fairy](https://github.com/starlitWixen/dnd-origins/wiki/Fairy)
- [Genasi](https://github.com/starlitWixen/dnd-origins/wiki/Genasi)
- [Gnome](https://github.com/starlitWixen/dnd-origins/wiki/Gnome)
- [Goblin](https://github.com/starlitWixen/dnd-origins/wiki/Goblin)
- [Halfling](https://github.com/starlitWixen/dnd-origins/wiki/Halfling)
- [Kobold](https://github.com/starlitWixen/dnd-origins/wiki/Kobold)
- [Loxodon](https://github.com/starlitWixen/dnd-origins/wiki/Loxodon)
- [Orc](https://github.com/starlitWixen/dnd-origins/wiki/Orc)
- [Tabaxi](https://github.com/starlitWixen/dnd-origins/wiki/Tabaxi)
- [Tiefling](https://github.com/starlitWixen/dnd-origins/wiki/Tiefling)
- [Triton](https://github.com/starlitWixen/dnd-origins/wiki/Triton)
- [Warforged](https://github.com/starlitWixen/dnd-origins/wiki/Warforged)
- [Human](https://github.com/starlitWixen/dnd-origins/wiki/Human)

## List of Classes

- [Artificer](https://github.com/starlitWixen/dnd-origins/wiki/Artificer)
- [Barbarian](https://github.com/starlitWixen/dnd-origins/wiki/Barbarian)
- [Bard](https://github.com/starlitWixen/dnd-origins/wiki/Bard)
- [Cleric](https://github.com/starlitWixen/dnd-origins/wiki/Cleric)
- [Druid](https://github.com/starlitWixen/dnd-origins/wiki/Druid)
- [Fighter](https://github.com/starlitWixen/dnd-origins/wiki/Fighter)
- [Monk](https://github.com/starlitWixen/dnd-origins/wiki/Monk)
- [Paladin](https://github.com/starlitWixen/dnd-origins/wiki/Paladin)
- [Ranger](https://github.com/starlitWixen/dnd-origins/wiki/Ranger)
- [Rogue](https://github.com/starlitWixen/dnd-origins/wiki/Rogue)
- [Sorcerer](https://github.com/starlitWixen/dnd-origins/wiki/Sorcerer)
- [Witch](https://github.com/starlitWixen/dnd-origins/wiki/Witch)
- [Wizard](https://github.com/starlitWixen/dnd-origins/wiki/Wizard)
- [Commoner](https://github.com/starlitWixen/dnd-origins/wiki/Commoner)

# Dependencies

- This data pack requires [Pehkui](https://modrinth.com/mod/pehkui).
- This data pack requires [Origins](https://modrinth.com/mod/origins) 1.12.3 or later. 
- This data pack requires the 1.20.2 fork of Origins: Classes, found [here](https://github.com/MerchantPug/origins-classes/tree/chore/1.20.2).
- Version 1.1.0+ of this data pack requires [Origins Extra Keybinds](https://modrinth.com/mod/origins-extra-keybinds-fabric). 
- Specific details of the halfling's abilities and druid's Wild Shape require [Extra Origins](https://modrinth.com/mod/extra-origins) to function, though if you don't intend to play a halfling or a druid this mod is not otherwise required.
- Version 1.1.2+ of this data pack requires [Woodwalkers](https://modrinth.com/mod/woodwalkers).

# Credit

Thanks so much to Nobody (Discord: chloeisnobody) for allowing me to use the teleportation power from the Better Enderian pack in D&D Origins!

# Documentation

The [D&D Origins Wiki](https://github.com/starlitWixen/dnd-origins/wiki) contains extensive documentation of the data pack's races, classes, and their unique abilities.
